{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212310214D6E1A66496AD7954E27"}"},"total":18702},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6889805745547083783","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉很好看啊，虽然前面几章比较大众，但是也很正常，可是后面的情节真的很精彩啊！文章的语言风格也是别有一番滋味，虽然十一本新书，但是我有预感假以时日这本书一定会火🔥的，作者大大加油，我会支持你的，虽然每天才几章没有完全完结追起来很累，后面我可能会开始屯章节，但是我会陪着书中的每一个人物一起走下去，我也很希望能够见证阿夜和汐汐的爱情❤️"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1604157913,"group_id":"6879293317817830414","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"赠尔只铃铛，一步一响，一步，一想","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwjeXqP+jVjmxYlqRGt1M023DA7i3TuzmWGMqRzCHje2","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9f80387489044146a64e5b2c78bc890e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622898&x-signature=k5MpkWgbNLECG4r5KJjIvJg%2Bw9o%3D","user_id":"2620830964255918","user_name":"卿羽小师妹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2620830964255918","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6879293317817830414","book_info":{"abstract":"【甜宠+虐渣+女主又飒又撩+掉马】
“宝贝，再敢逃，我把你关起来！”
“不……不逃了，我乖乖的。”
封司夜冷着脸将试图逃走的少女拉回怀中，残忍禁锢：“汐宝，记清楚，你是我的女人！”
娇软少女往男人怀里一滚：“荣幸之至～”
后来，金融大亨江阎、文学大家江寒，顶流巨星江野出现：“妹妹随便狂，哥哥来护航！”
掉马后，乖巧小白兔摇身一变活阎罗，踩白莲撕绿茶，狂屠新手村，众人瑟瑟发抖。封爷将少女圈入怀：敢骗我？今晚通个宵！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/96a6073d918e041c79d9e28855fe2c53","author":"绵绵心","author_id":"","book_id":"6879293317817830414","book_name":"在暴戾封爷的怀里为妃作歹","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2695人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":523,"name":"前世今生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=523&name=前世今生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6879755078845727240","read_count":"2695","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1236424"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"363","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,重生,团宠,甜宠,虐渣,豪门世家,大小姐,打脸,前世今生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.c 啊啊啊啊啊啊啊！表白作者大大！mua～加油！（不过还是要注意身体啊，劳逸结合，最后，新年快乐！）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1612967977,"group_id":"6879293317817830414","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没啥可写   真没啥可写的","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/nzlvfzpMJi6kSwTwCgNh01aQM0L3cIAqA7iYbZ5bf5","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c06d5bf13b114d16ababb3723126709d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618672&x-signature=jWfR0wwEmHFf2d%2B48VvvI4jUMZ4%3D","user_id":"1450999473509735","user_name":"白菜裹夫人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1450999473509735","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6879293317817830414","book_info":{"abstract":"【甜宠+虐渣+女主又飒又撩+掉马】
